category_sources: Official GitHub README describes CherryTree as a hierarchical note taking application.
source_facts.description says Cherrytree is a hierarchical note taking application with rich text and syntax highlighting.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository README uses the display name CherryTree.
source_facts.name provides the package name cherrytree.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README provides feature and build documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Cherrytree homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Cherrytree homepage says source is hosted on GitHub and gives git clone https://github.com/giuspen/cherrytree.git.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents rich text, syntax highlighting, images, tables, and export/import features.
source_facts.description lists hierarchical note taking, rich text, and syntax highlighting.
